name: ADOBE INC.
summary: Adobe Inc. builds innovative platforms and tools for creativity, productivity, and personalized customer experiences. Key products include Acrobat, Photoshop, Adobe Firefly, Adobe GenStudio, and Adobe Experience Platform. Adobe serves business professionals, consumers, creators, creative professionals, and marketing professionals with AI-powered solutions spanning document productivity, creative content creation, and digital marketing experience orchestration across desktop, web, and mobile.

products.name: Adobe Acrobat
products.description: Document productivity app with AI Assistant and freemium Reader offering for consuming, editing, and sharing PDFs.

products.name: Acrobat Studio
products.description: Integrated destination combining Acrobat and Express for insights, content creation, and collaboration.

products.name: Adobe Express
products.description: AI-powered quick and easy content creation app for business professionals and consumers.

products.name: Adobe Firefly
products.description: Commercially safe first-party generative AI foundation models for image, design, illustration, and video generation and editing.

products.name: Adobe GenStudio
products.description: Content supply chain solution unifying creative production and marketing execution for personalized content at scale.

products.name: Adobe Experience Platform
products.description: Customer data platform serving as enterprise foundation for digital customer engagement with AI-powered apps and agents.

products.name: Photoshop
products.description: Flagship professional image editing and creative application with embedded AI capabilities.

products.name: Firefly Services
products.description: AI-powered services bridging content creation and marketing execution for creative and marketing professionals.

products.name: Adobe Experience Platform AI Assistant
products.description: AI assistant embedded in Adobe Experience Platform to drive engagement, loyalty, and data-driven campaign optimization.

partnerships.description: Adobe partners with leading AI model providers to offer customers choice of models directly within Adobe solutions.
